title: 全てはまだプレリュード

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eccentric as her methods are, T.M. Opera's dedication to her dream is
truer than any.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not easy to find that kind of motivation, so I decide to have
another talk with her about training. As I'm scouring the school to find
her...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh, you glorious sun! Let us shine our light upon the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She strives to gain the sun-like light of the Overlord, believing her
conviction will carry her forward.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My brilliance shines bright as ever! Hahahaha! Haaah ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, she turns and runs off to continue her theatrics
elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can't help but notice the energy in each of her steps. Thinking back, her training was more impressive than I gave her credit for...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! I dance as beautifully as a swan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without perfectly balanced form, she could never have kept up those
nimble dance moves.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark! What dances through the skies with the grace of a swallow? 'Tis
I!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even her diving at the pool required a strong mental fortitude.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: May my beauty fill the whole world with happiness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And her power and speed climbing those stairs to the shrine were a
true testament to her abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She isn't just saying she wants to be Overlord. She wants all the skill
and ability that the title requires.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe... she really is on the track to glory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I had the strangest sensation that someone called my name. Must've
been a fancy of my imagination...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's too far away to notice my futile attempts to call her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll just have to get really loud... I'll call her in a voice suitable to
summoning the Overlord!
choice_data_list: Haha... Haaaah ha ha ha HAH!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That voice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What fortune is this?! If it isn't my former provisional trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That laugh just now was as magisterial as a true Overlord... What
brought about this change in you?
choice_data_list:
I want to become a trainer magisterial enough
to work with you.

I want to become a trainer magisterial enough
to work with you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear that, world?! This fine trainer wishes to work with me
once again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Such a majestic bellow of laughter was for me?! Of course it was...
Hehe, hahaha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha ha hah! What fun this is turning out to be, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But be not mistaken! For us to become a real team, we must share in
the same aspirations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So I would hear it from your lips! Tell me true, what is the absolute
meaning in "Overlord" that I seek?
choice_data_list:
To seize your dream, through overwhelming
victory!

To seize your dream, through overwhelming
victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah... Superb! Most excellent—positively perfect, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The overwhelming power of the Overlord imparts bravery to the
masses! The Overlord becomes the hope that people live for!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is precisely why I will settle for no mere first-place win—I will
obtain absolute victory and become the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Have you steeled your heart to combine forces and achieve
immortality?!
choice_data_list:
Making you Centurial Overlord will be my life's
mission!

Making you Centurial Overlord will be my life's
mission!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha ha ha hah! Well said, Trainer! A new legend begins
on this day!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Though, such a stupendous event must be fittingly celebrated. How
best to cement this in history... I know! Let's take a selfie!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You together with me, the Overlord—this "usie" shall be glorious.
Now let your joy shine forth!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Opera O sends me the pictures we took that day, which are
mostly of her alone...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless... With that, the curtains rose over our regal road to
victory.
